text:
stock total return performance the following graph compares our total return to stockholders with the returns of the standard & poor 2019s composite 500 index ( 201cs&p 500 201d ) and the dow jones us select health care providers index ( 201cpeer group 201d ) for the five years ended december 31 , 2014 .
the graph assumes an investment of $ 100 in each of our common stock , the s&p 500 , and the peer group on december 31 , 2009 , and that dividends were reinvested when paid. .


[TABLE]
|            | 12/31/2009   | 12/31/2010   | 12/31/2011   | 12/31/2012   | 12/31/2013   | 12/31/2014   |
|:-----------|:-------------|:-------------|:-------------|:-------------|:-------------|:-------------|
| hum        | $ 100        | $ 125        | $ 201        | $ 160        | $ 244        | $ 342        |
| s&p 500    | $ 100        | $ 115        | $ 117        | $ 136        | $ 180        | $ 205        |
| peer group | $ 100        | $ 112        | $ 123        | $ 144        | $ 198        | $ 252        |
[/TABLE]

the stock price performance included in this graph is not necessarily indicative of future stock price performance .
